helpText.body:
Hey all you hepcats and city slickers out there! Welcome to the smooth sounds of the School of Jazz! In this course, you'll get into the groove with the concepts, processes and deliverables of the pre-sale phase in the life of a deal.

You'll even get a chance to build some orders in our Slingshot sandbox environment!

To get started, scroll down the menu and click on each lesson. Once you've finished a lesson, the next one will unlock for you. And once you're jiving in the School of Jazz, you can raise the roof to the School of Pop!
